rows.headline: Major Gulf LNG producer declares force majeure on June-July cargo loadings after compressor train failure
rows.prelim_note: Supply/demand criterion: removes spot cargoes from a tight summer market; spot LNG assessments already +6% on the day.

rows.headline: SEBI issues consultation paper proposing tighter disclosure norms for promoter share pledges
rows.prelim_note: Regulatory-risk criterion: consultation stage (not final) — materiality likely PARK-band until adopted.
